aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business as it lacks relevant content and proper optimization for AI queries related to HVAC services. The website content is irrelevant to the business and misaligned with AI search behavior.
quick_wins: Remove irrelevant content about 'PanenTogel' and replace it with HVAC-focused content.
Implement structured data markup for LocalBusiness and FAQPage.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate contact information, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI models and reduce trust.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer.
Ensure the NAP details are consistent across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Add a dedicated HVAC services page with structured data markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish expert articles on common HVAC issues and solutions to establish authority.
